ddls:
CREATE TABLE "film_works" (
  "film_work_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each film or television show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film or television show */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film or television show */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film or television show in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the film or television show */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the film or television show */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue of the film or television show */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the film or television show */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the poster of the film or television show */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the trailer of the film or television show */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the film or television show */,
  "tmdb_id" TEXT /* TMDB ID of the film or television show */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the person */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the person */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the person */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the profile picture of the person */,
  "birthday_place" TEXT /* Place of birth of the person */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the person */,
  "death_place" TEXT /* Place of death of the person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "film_work_id" TEXT /* ID of the film or television show */,
  "person_id" TEXT /* ID of the person playing the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., director, writer, actor) */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_film_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_work_id") REFERENCES film_works ("film_work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_work_genres" (
  "film_work_id" TEXT /* ID of the film or television show */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_work_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_work_id" TEXT /* ID of the film or television show being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_work_id") REFERENCES film_works ("film_work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the watchlist */,
  "film_work_id" TEXT /* ID of the film or television show in the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_film_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_work_id") REFERENCES film_works ("film_work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_winners" (
  "award_winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award winner */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "film_work_id" TEXT /* ID of the film or television show that won the award */,
  "person_id" TEXT /* ID of the person who won the award */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_film_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_work_id") REFERENCES film_works ("film_work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the user (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)
